title: Dedication To Hewitt Hanson Howland With Halest Christmas Greetings And Fraternal
content:
Little Boy! Halloo! - halloo!
            Can't you hear me calling you? - 
        Little Boy that used to be,
            Come in here and play with me.
meaning:
This evocative piece by James Whitcomb Riley, titled "Dedication To Hewitt Hanson Howland With Halest Christmas Greetings And Fraternal", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
